name: sora
description: 宙 — a space megademo, conjured from nothing. A single looping production: starfield warp, plasma nebula, a spinning vector-ball planet, a wormhole tunnel, and a greetings sine-scroller — all synced to a self-synthesized chiptune soundtrack. No assets, no samples, no dependencies; stars, effects and music are computed in the browser. The timeline, music and 3D math are DOM-independent and headless-tested.
